backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented changes to pdfGenerator.ts: removing the yellow header border and increasing font sizes throughout the PDF.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Minimal Tailwind base CSS file defining light and dark OKLCH color tokens for shadcn-style design system variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN for client-side PDF generation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a sticky header with company branding, a hero banner with feature icons, the ReportForm, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Daily field report form managing project info, multiple lead and assistant technicians, work details, project status, a signature canvas, and PDF generation via pdfGenerator.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook wrapping DFINITY AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles defining a dark industrial OKLCH color system with safety yellow/orange accents, dark gray button component classes, and dark color-scheme for date inputs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point wrapping App with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates a formatted daily report PDF using jsPDF (loaded via CDN), defining data interfaces and helper functions for rendering sections, fields, headers, and signatures onto a letter-sized document.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording existing completed features and pending fix requests, specifically around removing yellow borders and increasing font sizes in the PDF generator utility.
